chapter_title.ar: باب كَرَاهَةِ الْجِزَافِ وَ فَضْلِ الْمُكَايَلَةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 67 – Abhorrence of the thing of unknown measurement or weight, and preference of the measurement

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/159)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/159)
text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) كِيلُوا طَعَامَكُمْ فَإِنَّ الْبَرَكَةَ فِي الطَّعَامِ الْمَكِيلِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad Bin Bundar, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from his father, from Haroun Bin Al Jahm, from Hafs Bin Umar,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘Measure out your foodstuffs, for the Blessings are in the measured foodstuffs’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali ibn Muhammad ibn Bandar has narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘Abd Allah from his father Harun ibn al-Jahm from Hafs ibn ‘Umar who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, has said, ‘Measure your food; blessings come with measured food.’”
